Loro Piana's collaboration with New Balance is officially released, showcasing a passionate craftsmanship encounter. Loro Piana has launched a limited edition New Balance collaboration, featuring the 990v6 sneakers. The high-quality leather is paired with Pecora Nera® merino wool from New Zealand, presenting an elegant sheen and supple elasticity. The unique craftsmanship is reshaped, inspiring a fresh sense of creativity with each step. Sizes available: Women 35-40, Men 39-45 (size 45 is custom-made and non-returnable).
